chunks.text: Microsoft Security Bulletin Summary for June | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Microsoft Security Bulletin Summary for June Microsoft has released security patches as of Tuesday, June 14th 2005. The securi

patches as of Tuesday, June 14th 2005. The security bulletin is available at http://www.microsoft.com/technet/security/bulletin/ms05-jun.mspx Security patches defined by Microsoft as “critical” or “important” MUST be applied within 5 business days o

mportant” MUST be applied within 5 business days of notification. Should there be active exploits, the time will be adjusted and users will be informed appropriately. Hosts unpatched after the defined time are subject to scanning and removal from th
